note: Append-only, PII-free record of the three-leg self-claim dogfood on the live `calllint` account (new13 Phase 2.5-A; ADR 0055 §7). Public coordinates + the observed verdict/digest per leg only — never a token, never anything that could move a verdict. A leg's entry stays null until the human GitHub-UI App action for it is performed and the verify job commits the reconciled store. The offline proof that verdict + pageDigest are byte-identical across all three legs is machine-checked by packages/trust-index/test/self-claim-dogfood.test.ts; this file records that the REAL legs were exercised on the live account.

invariant.description: A maintainer claim states namespace CONTROL, never safety; it may appear, be revoked, and reappear WITHOUT ever moving the observed verdict or the page digest (ADR 0047 §1 / 0053 §3). Every non-null leg below MUST carry these exact values.
